creator: ady@ady.ro
text:
The source tarball has (again) changed, bringing the port skeleton in an
unbuidable state.

Fix: Attached to this message is a gzip-ed diff file to patch the following
files:
     * files/md5: new checksum (source tarball timestamp: May 28 1998
                  10:59)
     * patches/pach-ab: src/osdep/unix/Makefile has changed again; only
                        "cosmetic" fix to the patch in order to apply
                        without fuzz & rejects

--8<--
How-To-Repeat: 
  Build the port (as of 31 May 1998).
